title: LED RGB
description: Adds colorful new lights for displays!
body: ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c121dc061e8a8b6ce643f2a36ac564fe37ee921_0.webp) # LED RGB ### Supported Versions * **NeoForge 1.21.1** * **Forge 1.20.1** --- ## About LED RGB adds simple, compact, and configurable colored lighting powered by redstone. The mod was designed with **Create** builds in mind, making it easy to create indicators, status lights, displays, and automation feedback systems. However, **Create is not required** and the mod works perfectly in any vanilla or modded world. --- ## Included Content * **LED Block** * **Power Adjuster** * **Command Panel** --- ## How It Works ### LED Block The LED changes color based on the redstone signal strength it receives. | Signal Strength | Color | | --------------- | ---------- | | 1 | White | | 2 | Red | | 3 | Orange | | 4 | Yellow | | 5 | Green | | 6 | Turquoise | | 7 | Light Blue | | 8 | Blue | | 9 | Dark Blue | | 10 | Lavender | | 11 | Purple | | 12 | Pink | | 13 | Hot Pink | | 14 | Brown | | 15 | Black | Simply provide a redstone signal from **1–15** and the LED will display the corresponding color. ### Power Adjuster The Power Adjuster allows you to lock an LED to a specific color. 1. Place a Power Adjuster directly on an LED. 2. Right-click the Power Adjuster to select a color. 3. Power the LED. Once configured, the LED will always display the selected color, regardless of the incoming redstone signal strength. --- Create colorful indicators, machine status lights, control panels, and decorative lighting with a simple redstone-powered system.
